guide:
## 🛡️ Warrior Exemplar Quest

**Quest Name:** Warrior Exemplar Quest  
**Level:** 55-60  
**Class:** Warrior  
**NPC:** —  
**Location:** Oggok

---

### 1️⃣ Quest Start
Log the quest with the **Priest of Rallos Zek**, located outside the north gate of Oggok. He will send you to see **Ragh Skulcrak** in **Oggok Gate (S)**.

---

### 2️⃣ Bandit Blades
Ragh is located in the same general area as Ozmo da Basher, but closer to the gate. He sends you to bandits north of the gate (**Oggok Gate (C)**), along the mountain. Kill and loot the **Bandit Thugs** until you get **6 Bandit Blades**, then return to Ragh.

---

### 3️⃣ Diren's Hold
Ragh will now send you back to the **Priest of Rallos Zek**, who sends you to see **Dhia Stoneshield** in **Diren's Hold (C)**. She is not in the village, but above it in the fort on top of the mountain.

She sends you to find a "beast" in **Mount Hatespike** that you **cannot kill** — you must let it attack you until it gives up and goes away.

---

### 4️⃣ Fell Beast Encounter
Head to **Mt. Hatespike (N)** to find the **Fell Beast** (southeast of the Frozen Souls) in a small canyon-triggered spawn.

You must **tank him for 10 minutes**. After 10 minutes he despawns and your quest log updates. Do **not** kill the mob.

Necroevil (FH) explains the spawn point: From Frozen Souls head southeast, follow the canyon until it starts turning southbound — at that curve he will jump you.

Azzare notes there is a slight glitch: you must be exactly on the spawn spot to receive the popup. Otherwise you may tank indefinitely without completion. If this happens, move around the area to find the correct spot.

---

### 5️⃣ Final Choice
Return to **Dhia Stoneshield**, then back to the **Priest of Rallos Zek**, where you must choose between:

- learning more about hurting your enemy — **Dropkick**, or  
- learning more about altering your stats from dex to wis — **Serenity**.

This is similar to the Paladin Exemplar Quest. You can redo the quest later to choose the other ability, but you cannot hold both abilities in your spellbook at the same time.

---

## ⚔️ Dropkick (Offensive Path)

Seek **Ragh Skulcrak** in **Oggok Gate (S)**. He sends you to farm the **Bandit Thugs** again (north of the gate, Oggok Gate (C)). Items stack to 50. When full, return to Ragh and throw them into **Ragh's Firepit**.

You gain faction for each item thrown into the fire. You need **2,000 faction** to proceed.

- Blades give 10 faction  
- Charms give 50 faction

**NOTE:** Continue speaking with the Firepit and choose "No" before finishing the quest with the Priest of Rallos Zek. Failing to do so may cause the quest to loop between NPCs and require CSR assistance to correct.

Speak with the **Priest of Rallos Zek** and request your offensive reward. He opens a **1cm ability called Dropkick**.

If you later want the dex→wis buff instead, redo steps 1–5 and choose Serenity.

---

## 🛡️ Serenity (Defensive Path)

Return to **Dhia Stoneshield** in **Diren's Hold (C)**. Farm **Frozen Souls** in **Mt. Hatespike (N)** for **Soul Shards** (stack to 50). When full, return to Dhia and place them into **Dhia's Blessed Chest** beside her.

Each item grants faction (10 or 50). You need **2,000 faction** to proceed.

Speak with the **Priest of Rallos Zek** to receive your reward. He opens a **1cm ability called Serenity**.

If you later want Dropkick instead, redo steps 1–5 and choose Dropkick.

---

## 🎁 Rewards

**Offensive Path (Ragh):** Opens a 1cm ability called **Ankle Biter** — this attack cripples your opponent for a short time and causes damage; adds ability **Dropkick**.  
Lvl 54 Equip req: Any Power:250 Cast:1 Recast:6 Range:5  
99 damage + 150% Str mod

**Dhia's Path:** Opens a 1cm ability called **Tranquility**, granting the level 60 ability **Serenity**. This ability changes Dex buffs to Wis buffs. **+65 Wis**, duration 10 minutes.
